flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Coastal Bend College fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (54.8% → 39.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Coastal Bend College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.8k vs 2.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Coastal Bend College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 2.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Coastal Bend College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (11.0% vs 19.8%).
